artPrompt: The harrowing moment a kneeling ashen seer throws back their hood as fiery visions erupt before their eyes, a vertical cascade of cold-gold and ember light pouring over a blood-dark sky filled with distant flame. Guttering candles gutter around them; a looming clock tower fades in smoke. One searing light source carves the seer's anguished face from the gloom, rendered as a moody oil painting — old-master chiaroscuro, visible impasto brushwork, deep shadow, warm varnished tones.
name: Visions of the End
text:
You draw three cards and lose 3 life. The visions are vivid, unsolicited, and mostly about fire.
Prophecy (As this resolves, predict heads or tails out loud and flip a coin.) If you predicted correctly, you lose no life this way. If you were wrong, put a doom counter on the Doomsday Clock; the vision was accurate.
flavorText: "I have seen the end of all things. It happens on a Tuesday. It's always a Tuesday."
